title: Audit + correct cliType=codex misconfig on claude-* profiles
description:
Two profiles in ~/.sweech/config.json have inconsistent cliType: `claude-or-pole` and `claude-mm-pro` both have `cliType: codex` despite the `claude-` name prefix. The on-disk dirs `~/.claude-or-pole/` and `~/.claude-mm-pro/` look like Claude profile dirs (218 commands each, including vy-*) — not Codex ones.

The wrong cliType means `setupSharedDirs` would pick `CODEX_SHAREABLE_DIRS` instead of `SHAREABLE_DIRS` — which is why these profiles never got the standard Claude shared layout but instead accumulated their own copies.

Fix:
1. Add a `sweech validate-config` check that flags name-prefix vs cliType mismatches
2. Offer `--fix-cli-type` to correct config entries based on the name prefix when on-disk evidence agrees (e.g. dir has claude-shaped contents)
3. After correction, T-076's doctor should pick them up and convert their bespoke commands/agents into proper shared symlinks (or warn that the divergent content needs manual review first)

context.text: Surfaced while investigating /vy-go Unknown command in claude-pole. Side-effect of the same investigation: noticed claude-or-pole + claude-mm-pro have cliType=codex sharedWith=None, contradicting the name and the dir contents.

Done via /vy-go 2026-05-21. Added sweech validate-config with JSON output, line-numbered cliType mismatch findings, Claude disk-shape confirmation via ~/.<profile>/projects, --fix-cli-type dry-run/confirmation semantics, and loud non-auto-fix warnings for disk evidence that disagrees with both prefix and config. Proof: npm test -- --runInBand tests/postinstallHeal.test.ts tests/cliTypeAudit.test.ts passed 24 tests; npm test -- --runInBand passed 99 suites, 2387 tests, 5 skipped; npm run build passed; npx tsc --noEmit passed; npm audit --audit-level=moderate found 0 vulnerabilities; cd macos-menubar/SweechBar && swift build passed; git diff --check passed. E2E: isolated HOME validate-config --json reported a mismatch with a config line number, and validate-config --fix-cli-type --yes --json corrected cliType from codex to claude.

acceptanceCriteria: `sweech validate-config` reports name/cliType mismatches with line numbers
`sweech validate-config --fix-cli-type` corrects them after dry-run confirmation
Heuristic: a profile named `claude-*` is checked against ~/.<name>/projects to confirm Claude shape
Profiles where on-disk content disagrees with both prefix AND config: print loud warning, exit non-zero, do not auto-correct
